mapper.update: UPDATE test_task SET completedSubtasks = completedSubtasks + 1, updateTime = NOW(), startedAt = CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN NOW() ELSE startedAt END, completedAt = CASE WHEN completedSubtasks >= totalSubtasks THEN NOW() ELSE completedAt END, status = CASE WHEN completedSubtasks >= totalSubtasks THEN 'completed' WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 'running' ELSE status END WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'failed')

UPDATE test_task SET completedSubtasks = completedSubtasks + 1, updateTime = NOW(), status = 'failed', startedAt = CASE WHEN startedAt IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE startedAt END WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status IN ('pending', 'running')
